title: coryphantha durangensis
intro: Coryphantha durangensis, also known as the Durango ball cactus or Durango pincushion cactus, is a species of cactus in the genus Coryphantha, native to the states of Durango and Nayarit in Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its alkaloids and other compounds. The health benefits of Coryphantha durangensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and protect against microbial infections. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues.
